description_long: This is a large, L-shaped modular kitchen cabinet unit featuring a combination of closed cabinets, open shelving, and a tall pantry section. The lower section consists of multiple cabinet doors with sleek, horizontal handles, and a central area with a cooktop cutout and a metallic vent or grill. The right side rises into a tall, vertical pantry with two open shelves and two closed compartments, one at the top and one at the bottom. The surfaces are finished in a wood grain texture with contrasting lighter-colored cabinet doors, giving it a modern, urban aesthetic. The unit is designed to be placed against a wall, with ample storage and workspace for kitchen or utility use. The overall construction appears robust, with a mix of wood-based panels and metal hardware.
description: A modern, L-shaped kitchen cabinet unit with wood grain finish, multiple closed cabinets, open shelves, and a tall pantry section. Features sleek handles and a central cooktop cutout.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shaped layout, cabinet doors, cooktop cutout, and tall pantry with open shelves.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth and wood grain texture of the tall pantry section.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous wood grain back panels and the open shelving from the side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the cooktop cutout and the side profile of the lower cabinets and pantry.
